title: Yu (Alice Fong) Elementary School Reviews - GreatSchools
content: This school is clean, safe, the teachers are dedicated, very involved and super creative. They are teaching Cantonese, Mandarin and English.

title: ALICE FONG YU ALTERNATIVE SCHOOL - Updated June 2026

title: Alice Fong Yu Elementary in San Francisco, CA - Niche
content: A remarkable school! A gem in the SFUSD system. Extremely low teacher turnover in the 12 years our family has attended. Extremely low student turnover as well.
